rulings.Case Title: PHILIP E. KAY VS. STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Amend And File Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 2, 2011, line 7. PLAINTIFF PHILIP KAY'S Motion To Amend And File Third Amended Complaint. Pursuant to the court's February 3, 2011 ruling, it is hearing the motion to amend and demurrers. The court sustains the demurrers without leave to amend and takes the motion to amend off calendar as moot. Prevailing parties to prepare orders. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: LIFESTYLE DESIGN GROUP LLC, A VS. AMERICAN PEGASUS AUTO LOAN FUNDS, SP, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Attorneys Alan Sparer And The Sparer Law Group
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 2, 2011, line 8. PLAINTIFF LIFESTYLE DESIGN GROUP L.L.C.'S Motion To Disqualify Attorneys Alan Sparer And The Sparer Law Group is denied. There is no substantial relationship between the previous representation and the present action. Furthermore, the confidential information, if any, obtained in 2002 has not been shown to be relevant to the present action. =(302/LMG)
